column5: Configure production PostgreSQL connection: update apps/api/src/config.py with connection pool settings (pool_size, max_overflow, pool_timeout), verify docker-compose.yml db profile works with asyncpg, add integration test that connects to Postgres container, update docs/architecture/data-layer.md with connection configuration details. Acceptance: make test passes with DATABASE_URL pointing to Postgres container.

Implement a sample domain module to validate the scaffolding pattern: create apps/api/src/example/ with router.py, service.py, models.py, schemas.py following docs/development/module-patterns.md. Include CRUD endpoints for a simple Example entity. Add tests in apps/api/tests/test_example.py. Register router in main.py. Acceptance: all CRUD endpoints return correct status codes, tests pass, module follows Python procedures.

Consolidate queue seeding: ensure scripts/idea-to-queue.sh documents and invokes the same manifest-first path as skills/init/queue-seeder.py (init-manifest.json with non-empty queue_seed_rows), with explicit --from-idea fallback when the manifest has no rows. Acceptance: make idea:queue appends from manifest when present; duplicate queue IDs are skipped; make queue:validate passes; orchestrator Step 7 calls queue-seeder only.

Verify init-manifest-schema.md and orchestrator PR template: ensure the saas_product + billing + email + workers annotated example remains the canonical reference; ensure gh pr create body includes explicit post-merge branch cleanup (checkout main, pull, delete local and remote init branch). Acceptance: docs reviewed; PR body from init-from-idea.py includes the full merge instructions block.

Orchestrator Step 3 observability: confirm docker compose config --services runs with COMPOSE_PROFILES set and logs the resolved service list to init-manifest.log (or documents skip when Docker is unavailable). Acceptance: log line present on agents with Docker; graceful message when docker is missing.

Configure production PostgreSQL connection: update apps/api/src/config.py with connection pool settings (pool_size, max_overflow, pool_timeout), verify docker-compose.yml db profile works with asyncpg, add integration test that connects to Postgres container, update docs/architecture/data-layer.md with connection configuration details. Acceptance: make test passes with DATABASE_URL pointing to Postgres container.

Acceptance: all CRUD endpoints return correct status codes, tests pass, module follows Python procedures.

Acceptance: make idea:queue appends from manifest when present; duplicate queue IDs are skipped; make queue:validate passes; orchestrator Step 7 calls queue-seeder only.

Acceptance: docs reviewed; PR body from init-from-idea.py includes the full merge instructions block.

Acceptance: log line present on agents with Docker; graceful message when docker is missing.

Raise automated test coverage toward the policy floor in pyproject.toml ([tool.coverage.report] fail_under, currently 55%): audit existing tests for gaps, add edge-case tests for auth (expired tokens, malformed JWTs, duplicate registration), add integration tests for health endpoints with database down scenario, add tenant middleware tests. Acceptance: make test passes with coverage at or above fail_under (adjust target in summary if policy floor changes). Definition of done: coverage ratchet satisfied; no regression in existing suites.
